name: Seneca Bancorp, Inc.
summary: PARTI Seneca Bancorp, Inc. Seneca Bancorp, Inc. (Seneca Bancorp; the Company; we; our) is a Maryland corporation that was incorporated in June 2025 to become the registered bank holding company for Seneca Savings Bank, National Association (Seneca Savings Bank or the Bank) upon the conversion of Seneca Financial MHC (the Mutual Holding Company), a federally chartered mutual holding company, from the mutual-to-stock form of organization, which occurred on October 15, 2025 (the Conversion).
